weapons.name: ABR A1
weapons.description: Three-round burst assault rifle.  Good handling and power. Moderate recoil and range. Configurable to full auto.

weapons.name: AK-27
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Very high damage and low vertical recoil, but high horizontal recoil and slow handling.

weapons.name: AK-74
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Imposing firepower with high damage at mid-to-long range balanced by a slower rate of fire and heavier recoil.

weapons.name: AMES 85
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Impressive accuracy and a suitable rate of fire make this an excellent weapon for mid to long range engagements.

weapons.name: AS VAL
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Leads the way in stealth while remaining suitable for urban combat through its integrated suppressor and improved mobility.

weapons.name: BAL-27
weapons.description:
A bullpup prototype weapon designed to increase fire rate over time while the trigger is squeezed. The first 4 shots are slower to fire but highly accurate.”
Top-loading with a reasonably rapid ammo swap, this fast-firing future-proof Assault Rifle shreds at closer ranges, has a moderate kick that drifts upward, offers great default reticles, and comes with a 60-round magazine once you’ve leveled it up, doubling the available ammo between reloads.

weapons.name: CR-56 Amax
weapons.description: This lightweight 7.62 x 39mm full-auto assault rifle is compact and powerful. Built exclusively for military use, the standard issue rifle is deadly at mid-range combat and easily configured for a variety of assault tactics.

weapons.name: Cypher 091
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Slower rate of fire balanced by great handling and excellent mobility.

weapons.name: DG-56
weapons.description: With excellent recoil control and three-round burst fire, this bullpup AR dominates at mid- to long range.

weapons.name: DS20 Mirage
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Respectable damage and integrated underbarrel grenade launcher. Offset by moderate recoil, mobility, and handling.

weapons.name: EGRT-17
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Fires superheated rounds that ricochet off solid surfaces.

weapons.name: FFAR 1
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Very high rate of fire and excellent CQB power, but slower handling and mobility.

weapons.name: FR 5.56
weapons.description: A three round burst bullpup AR. A well-placed burst can be extremely deadly at intermittent ranges.

weapons.name: GOBLIN MK 2
weapons.description: Semi-auto assault rifle. The Goblin Mk2 excels at short to mid ranges where its operator can take full advantage of its handling and impressive rate of fire.

weapons.name: GPR 91
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. What this rifle lacks in raw power, it makes up for in spades with best-in-class handling and a decent rate of fire.

weapons.name: Holger 556
weapons.description: Chambered in 5.56, this AR offers exceptional range and reliability for most engagements.

weapons.name: KILO 141
weapons.description: Fully automatic assault rifle with an ergonomic design that improves handling, and a steady fire rate helps stay on target.

weapons.name: KRIG C
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. High damage and average handling. Recoil pattern starts very controllable before ramping up.

weapons.name: M15 Mod 0
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Well-rounded in its power, accuracy, and handling.

weapons.name: MCW
weapons.description: This remarkably adaptable AR features phenomenal recoil control and versatility from a lightweight frame chambered in 5.56.

weapons.name: MK35 ISR
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Low recoil for excellent accuracy with moderate damage and handling.

weapons.name: MODEL L
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Slow-firing and controllable with respectable damage, the Model L shines in calculated engagements at mid-range.

weapons.name: MTZ-556
weapons.description: Boasting an exceptional fire rate for a 5.56 weapon, this close-quarters AR excels at close and mid-range.

weapons.name: MXR-17
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Excellent accuracy and range, offset by its slower mobility and rate of fire.

weapons.name: Maddox RFB
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Fast fire rate with a large ammo pool.

weapons.name: Merrick 556
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Excellent range and highly rewards headshots. Configurable into a high-power semi-auto via barrel attachment.

weapons.name: Peacekeeper Mk1
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. Exceptional mobility and handling, but high recoil and limited range.

weapons.name: Ram-7
weapons.description: Exceptionally compact, this bullpup assault rifle sports a lightweight, polymer frame and is chambered in versatile 5.56. When you need power and mobility, the RAM-7 is a sure bet. The weapon deals solid damage at close and medium range and in controlled bursts can compete from afar. Its lightweight frame results in a quick reload and fast handling so you can stay on the offensive.

weapons.name: STG44
weapons.description: The rifle that heralded the age of the assault rifle as a global standard. Fully automatic and chambered in 7.92x33mm, this is a hard-hitting primary weapon.

weapons.name: SVA 545
weapons.description: This weapon system fires the first two rounds nearly at the same time, making this an incredibly lethal weapon in careful hands.

weapons.name: Voyak KT-3
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. High damage and excellent handling, with slower fire rate and moderate to high recoil.

weapons.name: X9 Maverick
weapons.description: Three-round burst rifle. Great damage and recoil control. Average mobility and slower handling.

weapons.name: XM4
weapons.description: Full-auto assault rifle. A well-rounded weapon with average accuracy, mobility, and power among its counterparts.

weapons.name: Bas-B
weapons.description: A highly controllable and powerful Battle Rifle chambered in 6.8 Wrath designed for all-around reliability and performance.

weapons.name: DTIR 30-06
weapons.description:
Slow-firing and hard-hitting battle rifle chambered in .30-06.
Steady and powerful, this Battle Rifle works wonders in the hands of a skilled Operator. Its slow fire rate helps you conserve ammo and stay on target, inflicting heavy damage with each shot. Its strong base model gives you plenty of control when building the weapon out in Gunsmith. Throw on a scope to keep enemies at a distance, bulk up its ammo reserves with a larger magazine, and improve its handling speeds with an assortment of ergonomic designs.

weapons.name: MTZ-762
weapons.description: A fully automatic Battle rifle designed to send hard-hitting 7.62 rounds downrange at high velocity.

weapons.name: SOA Subverter
weapons.description: Chambered in 7.62, this hard-hitting rifle dominates at mid to longer ranges thanks to a low rate of fire and predictable recoil. With an effective damage range up to 25 meters and the highest rate of fire within its class, the SOA Subverter is well worth considering as your new main weapon. Its steady upward recoil is easily manageable for staying on target through sustained fire, combined with a solid damage output that downs most enemies in three to four shots before factoring in Armor Plates.

weapons.name: Sidewinder
weapons.description: A highly adaptable Battle Rifle chambered in .450 that delivers high damage at close to mid-range.

weapons.name: Bruen Mk9
weapons.description: The Bruen Mk9 is a fully automatic, air-cooled light machine gun chambered in 5.56. Support your team and pin down the enemy with a high fire rate and overwhelming covering fire.

weapons.name: DG-58 LSW
weapons.description: A lightweight squad weapon for controlling zones and laying down suppressive 5.8x42mm fire.

weapons.name: Feng 82
weapons.description: Full-auto light machine gun. Very slow rate of fire with great damage and handling.

weapons.name: GPMG-7
weapons.description: Full-auto light machine gun. Unparalleled ability to quickly neutralize threats thanks to a blistering fire rate and suitable long-range damage.

weapons.name: Holger 26
weapons.description: A highly modular light machine gun that can be adapted to most combat scenarios. Chambered in versatile 5.56 ammunition.

weapons.name: Kastov LSW
weapons.description:
With its best-in-class fire rate and Tac Stance accuracy, this LMG was crafted to tear enemies through at short to medium range.
Shirking the traditional role of an LMG, the Kastov LSW encourages closing the distance to your targets by pairing a high fire rate with incredible accuracy in Tactical Stance. The weapon also sports a fast reload speed so you can get right back into the action after exhausting its hefty 100 round default magazine. Use Gunsmith to further enhance the LMG, from improving Tac Stance accuracy even more to building it out for longer ranged play with attachments extending its damage range and bullet velocity.

weapons.name: MK.78
weapons.description: Full-auto light machine gun. Great damage and high ammo count, limited by slower mobility and handling.

weapons.name: PML 5.56
weapons.description: Full-auto light machine gun. Fast rate of fire and high lethality offset by low mobility and hefty recoil.

weapons.name: PU-21
weapons.description: Full-auto light machine gun. Deceptively lightweight and easy to aim with high damage. Rewards vigilance and careful recoil control.

weapons.name: Pulemyot 762
weapons.description: Chambered in 7.62, this belt-fed heavy machine gun provides excellent suppressive fire, dealing a massive amount of damage at long ranges.

weapons.name: Sokol 545
weapons.description: Full-auto light machine gun. Can switch on demand between a slower fire rate with high accuracy and range, and a faster fire rate with higher damage and recoil.

weapons.name: TAQ Evolvere
weapons.description: An advanced, multi-caliber LMG capable of firing 7.62 or 5.56 with minimal adjustments to the weapon. Versatile and exceptionally lethal in the right hands.This all-new Light Machine Gun can take down both infantry and artillery, whichever chooses to cross its path.

weapons.name: Taq Eradicator
weapons.description: Fully automatic LMG that utilizes a prototype firing method going from a closed to open bolt system starting out at a blazing fast Rate of Fire before quickly slowing down and becoming more accurate.

weapons.name: XM325
weapons.description: Full-auto light machine gun. Very fast fire rate, with excellent mobility and handling. Offset by higher recoil and shorter range.

weapons.name: XMG
weapons.description: Full-auto light machine gun. Belt-fed with best-in-class ammo capacity, the XMG has a slower fire rate, but powerful sustained fire accuracy.

weapons.name: A.R.C. M1
weapons.description: Charge launcher. Hold trigger to charge an energy beam that pierces enemies. Deals high damage to vehicles and Scorestreaks.

weapons.name: AAROW 109
weapons.description: Hybrid launcher. Locks on to vehicles and Scorestreaks, while also capable of accurate free fire.

weapons.name: CIGMA 2B
weapons.description: Lock-on capable launcher. Can lock onto enemy Scorestreaks and vehicles. Fires a high-explosive 110-mm warhead for massive damage.

weapons.name: HE-1
weapons.description: Free-fire rocket launcher.  Fires a high-explosive 110-mm warhead for massive damage.

weapons.name: RGL-80
weapons.description: An infantry carried, revolving grenade launcher that fires 40mm projectiles that explode on impact.

weapons.name: Torque 35
weapons.description: A combat-ready compound bow with a 60lbs draw weight capable of taking down large prey. Certain types of arrows are retrievable after being fired.

weapons.name: AEK-973
weapons.description: Three-round burst DMR. Great stability and a fast rate of fire within each burst allows the AEK-973 to land multiple shots on target even at long ranges.

weapons.name: DM-10
weapons.description: Semi-auto DMR. Best in class stability and power make this the ideal marksman weapon for mid to long range engagements.

weapons.name: DM56
weapons.description: A titan of ballistic ingenuity, this Marksman Rifle boasts best-in-class rate of fire and exceptional controllability.

weapons.name: Essex Model 07
weapons.description: Lever-action marksman rifle. High damage potential. Balanced by slower rate of fire and handling.

weapons.name: KVD Enforcer
weapons.description: A Marksman Rifle chambered in 7.62. Lightweight construction results in excellent recoil control for rapid follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Kar98k
weapons.description:
This modernized version of a WWII bolt-action rifle is powerful and accurate. High damage output with a slow rate of fire.
Last seen in Call of Duty: Vanguard and found in the MWIII Marksman Rifle Loadout category after unlocking it in the Battle Pass, this archaic-looking rifle with only five rounds before a reload, and ten rounds in reserve, may get overlooked by the uninitiated. Veteran players, however, know this weapon is arguably the hardest-hitting and accurate long-range rifle there is, offering quick ADS speed, massive damage, limited flinch, small but functional iron sight, and rapid takedown potential no matter how far away your foe is.

weapons.name: M34 Novaline
weapons.description: Two-round burst Marksman Rifle. Two-round burst marksman rifle. Exceptional damage and range, but low mobility and fire rate.

weapons.name: M8A1
weapons.description: Four-round burst marksman rifle. Extreme rate of fire within the burst, balanced by moderate burst cooldown.

weapons.name: MCW 6.8
weapons.description: Chambered in 6.8, this highly modular Marksman Rifle features exceptional damage and reliability.

weapons.name: MTZ Interceptor
weapons.description: A high-powered Marksman Rifle chambered in 7.62. Control mid to long distances with this semi-auto weapon.

weapons.name: SWAT 5.56
weapons.description: Three-round burst DMR. The Swat 5.56 pairs strong stopping power with a fast burst cooldown for excellence at medium ranges.

weapons.name: Swordfish A1
weapons.description: 4-round burst marksman rifle. Fast cyclic fire rate and minimal recoil, but slower mobility and handling.

weapons.name: TR2
weapons.description: Semi-auto marksman rifle. Great rate of fire and respectable handling.

weapons.name: Tsarkov 7.62
weapons.description: Semi-auto DMR. The Tsarkov 7.62 sacrifices only some power in exchange for excellent handling, making it lethal in the hands of an accurate and mobile Operator.

weapons.name: Warden 308
weapons.description: Semi-auto Marksman Rifle. Very high damage and average handling. Limited by double-action fire delay.

weapons.name: Ballistic Knife
weapons.description: Spring-action knife launcher. High melee damage and can fire retrievable blades as projectiles.

weapons.name: Baseball Bat
weapons.description: Two-hit kill. The aluminum bat is light enough for quick swings and heavy enough to inflict serious, blunt trauma on victims.

weapons.name: Bo Staff
weapons.description: One-hit elimination. Slow attack speed. Very long range.

weapons.name: Boxing Gloves
weapons.description: Moderate damage. Fast attack speed. Long range.

weapons.name: Chainsaw
weapons.description: High damage. Medium attack speed. Short range.

weapons.name: Cleaver
weapons.description: One-hit kill. Short-medium range. Medium attack speed

weapons.name: Flatline MK.II
weapons.description: Melee weapon. High damage, short to moderate range, and moderate attack speed.

weapons.name: Gutter Knife
weapons.description: Standard issue combat knife. Great for quick stealth takedowns.

weapons.name: H311-SAW
weapons.description: Melee weapon. High damage, moderate to long range, and slow to moderate attack speed.

weapons.name: Kali Sticks
weapons.description: Two-hit kill. Extremely fast attack speed. Short range.

weapons.name: Karambit
weapons.description: A small, curved talon-style blade. Extremely sharp and discreet for fast and deadly melee attacks.

weapons.name: Katana
weapons.description: Melee weapon. High damage, moderate range, and moderate attack speed.

weapons.name: Katanas
weapons.description: One-hit elimination. Moderately fast attack speed. Short range.

weapons.name: Knife
weapons.description: One hit kill. Military-issue tactical knife well-suited for CQC scenarios where stealth, speed, and lethality are required.

weapons.name: Knife
weapons.description: Melee weapon. High damage, short range, and fast attack speed.

weapons.name: Nunchaku
weapons.description: Two-hit elimination. Very fast attack speed. Medium range.

weapons.name: Pickaxe
weapons.description: One-hit kill. Medium attack speed. Short range.

weapons.name: Power Drill
weapons.description: Two-hit kill. Very short range. Very fast attack speed.

weapons.name: Sai
weapons.description: One-hit elimination. Fast attack speed. Very short range.

weapons.name: Skateboard
weapons.description: One-hit elimination. Moderately fast attack speed. Moderately long range.

weapons.name: Sledgehammer
weapons.description: Smash the competition into the dirt with this sledgehammer melee weapon.

weapons.name: Spear
weapons.description: Channel your inner spartan with this razor-sharp, serrated spear. This weapons boosts melee reach and can be thrown at enemies
Semi-auto pistol. High damage at close range with decent recoil control and modest ammo capacity.

weapons.name: 9MM PM
weapons.description: Semi-auto pistol. With a decent rate of fire and standard handling, the 9mm PM is a masterclass in reliability and the easy choice for all close-quarter engagements.

weapons.name: CODA 9
weapons.description: Full-auto pistol. High damage and rate of fire, but high recoil and shorter effective ranges.

weapons.name: COR-45
weapons.description: Semi-auto ballistic pistol chambered in .45 Auto. Delivers excellent handling and recoil control.

weapons.name: GS45
weapons.description: Semi-auto pistol. The GS45’s .45 Auto rounds make this sidearm unmatched in close range stopping power.

weapons.name: Gravemark .357 Revolver
weapons.description: Single-action revolver. High power and considerable range, limited by lower ammo count and segmented reload.

weapons.name: Grekhova
weapons.description: Full-auto pistol. Surprising accuracy combined with a fast rate of fire offsets the lower damage and smaller effective range of the Grekhova.

weapons.name: Jäger 45
weapons.description: Semi-auto pistol. Reliable sidearm with a very fast rate of fire and low recoil.

weapons.name: Renetti
weapons.description: A burst-fire pistol with a staggering fire rate and controllability in the right hands.

weapons.name: Stryder .22
weapons.description: Semi-auto pistol. The Stryder .22 excels at finishing off damaged opponents in the heat of combat thanks to its fast semi-automatic rate of fire and best in class handling.

weapons.name: TYR
weapons.description: This deadly revolver chambered in devastating 12.7x55mm hits like a cannon and leaves no survivors.

weapons.name: Velox 5.7
weapons.description: Three-round burst pistol. High damage and controllable recoil, with a moderate effective range.

weapons.name: WSP Stinger
weapons.description: Keep your enemies close with this highly effective, room-clearing weapon with a blazing fire rate.

weapons.name: AMR9
weapons.description: A fully automatic SMG chambered in 9mm, the AMR9 is a go-to for Operators who prefer to shred the competition from close to mid-range.

weapons.name: C9
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. The C9 is a well-balanced weapon that performs reliably in all close to mid-range situations.

weapons.name: Carbon 57
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Very high ammo count, with respectable range and recoil. Below average damage for its class.

weapons.name: Dravec 45
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Very low recoil and decent range for the class. Offset by low damage, especially at longer ranges.

weapons.name: Dresden 9mm
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun.  Very high damage and manageable recoil. Short range and slower rate of fire.

weapons.name: FJX Horus
weapons.description: Versatility is the name of the game with this machine pistol SMG, a favorite of those who like to pack a punch on the run. This weapon has an incredible fire rate and class-leading mobility, and handling help mitigates the recoil control.

weapons.name: HRM-9
weapons.description: A light yet stable 9mm submachine gun for close quarters combat and putting down enemies quickly. Sporting a high fire rate and excellent handling and mobility, the HMR-9 is the perfect fit for aggressive run-and-gun playstyles. Aim down sights for precise fire or enter Tac-Stance and run circles around your enemies.

weapons.name: JACKAL PDW
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Great mobility and handling make this an easy choice for operators who aggressively seek CQB engagements.

weapons.name: KOMPAKT 92
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Chambered in 9mm with the fastest fire rate in class, the Kompakt 92 excels in close-range encounters.

weapons.name: KSV
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Fast to aim with manageable recoil and good damage. Perfect for a dexterous operator seeking broad proficiency.

weapons.name: Kogot-7
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Excellent mobility and fast fire rate, but shorter-range capabilities and moderate recoil.

weapons.name: LC10
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Excellent accuracy and range, with a moderate rate of fire. Average mobility and very slow handling for its class.

weapons.name: Ladra
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Extreme rate of fire, excellent range, and low recoil. Headshots can help offset lower base damage.

weapons.name: MPC-25
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Very high damage and excellent mobility and handling. Very high recoil and limited range.

weapons.name: PP-919
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. The PP-919 has the highest ammo counts in class, at the cost of some mobility and fire rate.

weapons.name: PPSh-41
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Fast fire rate with impressive damage and high recoil. Moderate handling.

weapons.name: REV-46
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Extremely fast fire rate. Switch between a folded and unfolded stock position to change handling and recoil characteristics.

weapons.name: RK-9
weapons.description: Three-round burst submachine gun. Rewards upper body and headshots in close quarters, with decent handling and mobility. Below average range.

weapons.name: Razor 9mm
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Extreme rate of fire but limited range and slower handling.

weapons.name: Rival-9
weapons.description: The Rival-9 is a lightweight, 9mm SMG built for agility and quick room-clearing.

weapons.name: Ryden 45K
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Solid balance of CQB (close quarter battle) power, handling, and recoil.

weapons.name: SAUG
weapons.description: Fully automatic submachine gun. Excellent mobility and good handling. Great rate of fire. High recoil.

weapons.name: Static-HV
weapons.description: Bring compact lethality to the battlefield with this small SMG chambered in 5.7x28mm. The weapon boasts a high fire rate and significant ammo capacity with a base of 50 rounds in its factory magazine.

weapons.name: Striker
weapons.description: A hard-hitting and controllable SMG chambered in .45 Auto. Reliable at close to mid-range.

weapons.name: Striker 9
weapons.description: This compact SMG handles like a carbine while taking advantage of the low recoil and versatility of 9mm rounds.

weapons.name: Sturmwolf 45
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Very low recoil and good headshot damage. Lower handling, mobility, and range.

weapons.name: Superi 46
weapons.description:
This pistol-caliber carbine chambered in 4.6x30mm is designed to give impressive stopping power with a skeletonized, lightweight frame. Exceptionally adaptable, this weapon can be modified to excel in most combat scenarios.
As you’d expect given the size of the caliber, the Superi 46 is impressively impactful at closer ranges, with 30 rounds in the chamber and 90 in reserve. However, this SMG offers accuracy to mid-range and above-average recoil control, delivering practicality as well as the firepower you need for most circumstances.

weapons.name: TANTO .22
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Slow-firing, but hard-hitting, the Tanto .22 is an easy-to-handle SMG with impressive mid-range performance.

weapons.name: VST
weapons.description: Full-auto submachine gun. Lightweight for excellent mobility with good handling. Supports multiple calibers.

weapons.name: WSP Swarm
weapons.description: Ultra combat and maneuverable, this 9mm SMG overwhelms targets with a fast fire rate.

weapons.name: WSP-9
weapons.description: A fully automatic SMG featuring a slow rate of fire balanced by high damage, control, and mobility.

weapons.name: ASG-89
weapons.description: Semi-automatic shotgun. Capable of taking down multiple targets in quick succession thanks to its decent magazine size and solid rate of fire.

weapons.name: Akita
weapons.description: Full-auto Shotgun. Excellent mobility and handling, balanced by high recoil and short range.

weapons.name: Echo 12
weapons.description: Rechambering double-barrel shotgun. Great range and high damage potential with back-to-back shots.

weapons.name: Haymaker
weapons.description: Highly effective at close range, this mag-fed combat shotgun will clear rooms with rounds to spare.

weapons.name: Lockwood 680
weapons.description: This highly effective and versatile 12-gauge pump shotgun can be modified to excel in most scenarios.

weapons.name: M10 Breacher
weapons.description: Pump-action charge shotgun. Optionally hold trigger to improve hip and ADS spread.

weapons.name: MARINE SP
weapons.description: Pump-action shotgun. Powerful and versatile with a short cycling time that allows for rapid target acquisition. Hand loaded with one-shot kill potential in close quarters.

weapons.name: Maelstrom
weapons.description: Fully automatic shotgun. Good range and handling. High recoil and large hip spread.

weapons.name: Reclaimer 18
weapons.description: A tactical shotgun that can be fired in both pump-action and semi-auto modes. Pump-action provides superior range while semi-auto increases fire rate.

weapons.name: Riveter
weapons.description: A full-auto, .310 shotgun built around an AR receiver, the Riveter is a hole-punching machine.

weapons.name: SG-12
weapons.description: Semi-auto shotgun. Well-rounded for mid-range performance.

weapons.name: AMR Mod 4
weapons.description: Semi-auto sniper rifle. One-shot kill to torso, arms, hands, and upper legs. Very high recoil and slow rate of fire. You can steady your aim while ADSing.

weapons.name: HDR
weapons.description: Anti-material bolt action sniper rifle chambered in 12.7 x 108mm ammunition. Bullets have a lower muzzle velocity but remain devastating even at very long ranges.

weapons.name: KATT-AMR
weapons.description: This devastating .50 cal bolt-action sniper rifle delivers massive damage downrange with every shot.

weapons.name: KV Inhibitor
weapons.description: This semi-auto sniper rifle chambered in .338 offers undeniable recoil control and stability for the discerning Operator.

weapons.name: LR 7.62
weapons.description: Bolt-action sniper rifle. The LR 7.62 delivers high damage with minimal recoil and slower handling. One shot kill to the head, chest, and arms. Hold the Left Thumbstick while ADS to steady.

weapons.name: LW3A1 Frostline
weapons.description: Bolt-action sniper rifle. The LW3A1 Frostline has decent rate of fire and handling speeds, but substantial recoil. One shot kill to the head, upper chest, and upper arms. Hold the Left Thumbstick while ADS to steady.

weapons.name: Longbow
weapons.description: A lightweight, heavily modified sniper rifle designed for precision shooting and repeat shots thanks to recoil control and magazine capacity.

weapons.name: MORS
weapons.description:
This single-load railgun delivers a high-damage payload with excellent velocity and penetration.”
An advanced form of sniper warfare, the Military Operated Rail Sniper (MORS) is a one-shot beast, offering high damage with exceptional handling. Distance is an afterthought with this long-range and accurate Sniper Rifle with what might be the perfect combination of accuracy and damage. The weapon has single-round devastation with a reasonably rapid reload rate.

weapons.name: SVD
weapons.description: Semi-auto sniper rifle. Gas-operated Soviet sniper with modest vertical kick. Capable of landing precise follow-up shots. One skill kill to the head. Hold the Left Thumbstick while ADS to steady.

weapons.name: XRK Stalker
weapons.description: For one-hit eliminations, look no further. The XRK Stalker Sniper Rifle deals massive damage and is highly customizable to support multiple playstyles. Enhance the weapon’s velocity and stability and strike from the shadows or improve its handling capabilities to become a quick-scoping menace.

weapons.name: Hawker HX
weapons.description: Bolt-action Sniper Rifle. Fast handling and mobility. Higher recoil and flinch. Hold breath while ADS to steady.

weapons.name: Shadow SK
weapons.description: Semi-auto sniper rifle. High power and stable recoil, but low fire rate.

weapons.name: Strider 300
weapons.description: Bolt-action sniper rifle. Fast handling with a slow rechamber and moderate stability. Hold breath while ADS to steady.

weapons.name: VS Recon
weapons.description: Bolt-action sniper rifle. Quick rechamber. Moderate recoil and stability. Ability to steady while in ADS.

weapons.name: XR-3 Ion
weapons.description: Three-round burst sniper rifle. High power and low recoil, but slower handling and short pre-fire delay. Ability to steady while in ADS.

weapons.name: D1.3 Sector
weapons.description: Rechambering blade launcher. Equip different magazines to access a variety of deadly projectile types.

weapons.name: GDL Havoc
weapons.description: Pump-action grenade launcher. Grenades stick to solid surfaces and can be remote detonated. No ADS.

weapons.name: NX Ravager
weapons.description: Launches high damage bolt projectiles. Can be configured to fire explosive bolts that detonate a short time after impact.

weapons.name: Nail Gun
weapons.description: Full-auto Nail Gun. High damage at close range with fast handling speeds and very low muzzle velocity.

weapons.name: Olympia
weapons.description: Double-barrel shotgun. Very high damage and respectable range but requires frequent reloading.

weapons.name: Siren
weapons.description: Charge energy weapon. Fires a high damage, slow moving projectile that passes through foes. Charge to improve projectile velocity.

weapons.name: Sirin 9mm
weapons.description: Full-Auto specialty weapon. Offers SMG characteristics as secondary weapon. Slow rate of fire.

weapons.name: X52 Resonator
weapons.description: Full-auto anomaly. Extreme rate of fire and range, but with high recoil.
